name: James "Bucky" Barnes|Winter Soldier
description:
Feral Compliance
Trapped in a Hydra facility, drugged into a forced rut, Bucky fights to resist the instincts but with an omega teammate writhing in heat just feet away, his control is slipping fastвА¶and the Winter Soldier is clawing to the surface.
